reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
They provided me with tourist information without obligation, and they treated me very well, in a pleasant and selfless manner.

reviews.comment:
Estuve en las cabañas muy lindas, pésimos colchones, para lo que cobran, podrían renovar los colchones y poner cafetera y pava eléctrica. No corresponde el precio con los servicios

(Translated by Google)
I stayed in the very nice cabins, but the mattresses were terrible. For what they charge, they could replace the mattresses and add a coffee maker and electric kettle. The price doesn't match the amenities.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRakpmcWNREAE
